category_sources: source_facts.description identifies star as a standard tap archiver; source_facts.executables lists star, suntar, ustar, spax, and scpio.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is star; current_curation.display-name is star.
docs_sources: Official Codeberg project from source_facts.homepage/source_facts.source-archive contains the star README as the best project documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official Codeberg schilytools repository and source_facts.source-archive is a Codeberg archive from the same project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says standard tap archiver; source_facts.executables includes tar/pax/cpio-style tools.
